title: codereview-P4: duplicate parse_*_logs functions in analyze-hetero-fleet.py
description: The three parse_python_logs, parse_rust_logs, parse_zephyr_logs functions share ~90% identical code for telemetry parsing, legacy fallback, and node registration. This violates DRY, makes maintenance error-prone (as seen in the TX/RX case fix needing updates in 3 places). Refactor to single parameterized parse_impl_logs(glob_pattern, impl_name, extra_tx=None, extra_rx=None). tagged codereview
